task_title: Test parse_stream() NDJSON extraction in event.rs

phase_history.output:
16 tests written and passing. The test module in `event.rs:158–310` covers every acceptance criterion:

| Criterion | Test(s) |
|---|---|
| `session_id` from System event | `test_session_id_from_system_event` |
| `session_id` from Result event | `test_session_id_from_result_event` |
| Result overwrites System `session_id` | `test_result_session_id_overwrites_system` |
| Result text beats assistant text | `test_result_text_beats_assistant_text` |
| Fallback when `result` is `""` | `test_fallback_when_result_is_empty_string` |
| Fallback when `result` is `null` | `test_fallback_when_result_is_null` |
| Multiple assistant turns joined with `\n` | `test_multiple_assistant_turns_concatenated`, `test_single_assistant_turn_no_newline_prefix` |
| Multiple text blocks in one turn | `test_multiple_text_blocks_in_one_assistant_turn` |
| Malformed/unknown lines skipped | `test_malformed_lines_skipped`, `test_unknown_event_type_skipped` |
| Blank lines skipped | `test_blank_lines_skipped`, `test_whitespace_only_input` |
| Empty input → `("", None)` | `test_empty_input` |
| No session_id anywhere → `None` | `test_no_session_id_returns_none` |
| Tool-use blocks produce no text | `test_tool_use_blocks_produce_no_text` |
